positive: A whimsical, kawaii-style illustration of a sleepy astronaut cat floating amongst pastel-colored nebulae and tiny, smiling planets. Simple, thick outlines, flat design, limited color palette of mint green, lavender, and peach. Joyful, cute, sticker art style, vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, grit, shadows
